question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks zero didactic questions. It dumps the full solution with table and answer immediately, leaving no teachable moments for the user to engage with.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks are surfaced to the user. The inclusion-exclusion insight, the brute-force trade-off, and the n=floor(999/k) boundary are all stated as facts rather than posed as questions.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the answer is fully revealed in turn one, including the final number. The user had to self-scaffold by retracing the math themselves.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized, but the flow is one-shot lecture followed by user self-verification. There is no back-and-forth dialog.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
